frame_analyses.description: Black screen, task not yet started
Gauze suspended between clamps with marked circle pattern visible, scissors approaching from right side
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good setup with clear circular pattern marked on gauze, approximately 4cm diameter

frame_analyses.description: Scissors making contact with gauze at top portion of circle, beginning cutting motion
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Initial entry appears to be on or very close to marked line

frame_analyses.description: Progressing clockwise around circle, approximately 1/4 of circle completed
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Cutting appears to follow marked line closely, steady progression

frame_analyses.description: Approximately halfway around circle, continuing clockwise cutting motion
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintains good alignment with marked circle, scissors positioned appropriately

frame_analyses.description: Approximately 3/4 of circle completed, approaching completion of full circumference
Circle appears to be completely cut out, final portion of cutting completed
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Circle appears intact and fully separated from surrounding gauze

penalties.description: Minor deviations from marked line visible at multiple points during cutting

confidence_rationale: Video quality allows clear observation of cutting progression and overall technique. Deviation measurements estimated from overhead view may have some error in precise millimeter measurements. Gauze integrity and completion clearly visible.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviations at all 8 cardinal points due to video resolution and angle
Whether any small portions of gauze may have detached that are not visible from this camera angle
technique_summary: Competent intermediate performance with steady cutting technique and good overall circle completion. Time of 175 seconds falls within intermediate range (90-180s). Minor deviations from marked line throughout cutting process.
strengths: Steady, controlled cutting motion throughout procedure
Complete circle cut without major irregularities
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise adherence to marked line to reduce deviation penalties
Consider shorter, more controlled cuts to improve accuracy
Practice to reduce total time closer to expert range (60-90s)
